title: Register, Formality and Nominalisation
description: Command the full spectrum of English register: formal vs informal/colloquial lexical choices, the power of nominalisation (turning verbs and adjectives into nouns), Latinate vocabulary vs phrasal verbs, and the features of academic tone.
sources: CEFR C2 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Michael Swan, Practical English Usage (register; formal and informal English; nominalisation)
